## Highlights

- **Claude Code multi-specialist phases work again** — `ginee-*` skills no longer silently degrade when `team-lead` needs to fan out. (D32)
- **Schema-shaped subagent returns get caught when they're not** — agents miss a single-line attestation marker, you see it in the orchestrator's one-line advisory instead of digging through the return. (D33)
- **Citations are scannable** — `ADR-0001-topology-derivation-five-pass` everywhere instead of bare `ADR-0001`. Copy-paste straight into a filesystem search. (D34)
- **No `local/` schema churn** — all three changes are purely additive; existing dispatches and adopter docs keep working.

## Adopter migration

Nothing to do — D32 / D33 / D34 apply on your next dispatch once the kernel reload picks up the addenda.

**Stuck on Claude Code with degraded multi-specialist phases (any pre-v0.13.0 version)?** D32 is the fix; just update.

Full specs: [D32](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/claude-adapter-subagent-dispatch.md) · [D33](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/phase-report-self-lint-hardening.md) · [D34](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/migrations/identifier-short-name-pairing.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.12.1...v0.13.0
